confirmed.note: two helper fns added in same commit share identical trim+scan-whitespace skeleton; only the final return (left(end) vs mid(split)+second skip loop) differs — copy-then-tweak

decompose-timeline split produced sibling role-switch fns with identical case-label skeleton; only LastMessage text and Is{Invite,Preview,Space} return values differ — copied switch body, should be table-driven

false_positives.what_happened: emoji 'rework' replaced a 16k-line hand/codegen-emitted emoji descriptor table (repeated struct initializers per emoji: name, unicode, shortcodes, group) with a generated/leaner provider; a token detector sees thousands of near-identical initializer rows as massive intra-file duplication
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: treat long runs of homogeneous aggregate-initializer rows (>=N consecutive lines matching a {literal,...} brace-initializer shape inside an array/initializer-list) as a data-table region and exclude from clone candidates; archcheck already has a generated-skip heuristic (#065) — extend the data-table classifier to braced-init arrays, not just file-header markers

false_positives.what_happened: 38-entry static command registry; each entry is a near-identical {CommandId::X, "name", tr(...), flags} initializer. Token stream of consecutive entries is highly self-similar and will trip a windowed clone detector as repeated 5-10 line blocks
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: same data-table exclusion as above — detect a single array/initializer-list literal and collapse its element rows into one logical token region so internal row repetition is not reported; gate clone reporting on whether the matched span crosses statement boundaries vs being inside one initializer expression

false_positives.where: src/cli/ThemeCommands.cpp -> src/cli/theme/* ; src/ui/RoomSettings.cpp -> src/ui/roomsettings/* ; src/db/InMemoryBackend.cpp -> src/db/inmemory/*
false_positives.what_happened: pure monolith-split refactor: code is MOVED (deleted from source .cpp, re-added verbatim in new focused .cpp files in same commit). A cross-file clone detector run on the post-commit tree would not fire (source gone), but a diff-mode/added-vs-base detector flags the added chunks as exact copies of the (now-deleted) base — false copypaste signal for what is a relocation
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056 --diff: when an ADDED span is byte-identical to a span DELETED in the same commit (rename/move detection across files, not just whole-file rename), classify as MOVE and suppress; this is the move-vs-copy distinction missing from diff mode (extends the rename detection of #061)

false_positives.what_happened: implementing litehtml::document_container forces a fixed family of small callbacks (draw_background, draw_borders, get_*_metrics, etc.) with the same QPainter setup/teardown preamble in each; the recurring boilerplate header of each override reads as a cloned block
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056/archcheck: raise the minimum distinct-statement count (ignore leading boilerplate prologue lines like painter->save()/restore(), guard checks) before counting a block as a clone; or weight interface-override methods lower when they share a known base-class signature set

cycle.desc: no cyclic SCC in authorial code
cycle.evidence: archcheck --graph: nodes=117 edges=33 sccs_cyclic=0 largest_scc=1; independent mutual-header-include heuristic over src/ found 0 mutual pairs; corpus detail also reports циклы=0 (SCC<=1). third_party/ (cpp-httplib, blurhash) is vendored but contributes no authorial cycle.
